name: devflow
description: DevFlow - Agentic Development Toolkit for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow-specify
plugins.description: Interactive feature specification - creates well-defined GitHub issues

plugins.name: devflow-implement
plugins.description: Complete task implementation workflow with exploration, planning, and coding

plugins.name: devflow-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive code review with parallel specialized agents

plugins.name: devflow-resolve
plugins.description: Process and fix code review issues with risk assessment

plugins.name: devflow-catch-up
plugins.description: Context restoration from development status logs

plugins.name: devflow-devlog
plugins.description: Development session logging and status tracking
